channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: AliExpress veut concurrencer Amazon avec Marque+, un endroit dédié aux produits certifiés authentiques
item.description: Si vous avez déjà commandé sur AliExpress, vous avez votre propre expérience, qu'elle soit bonne ou mauvaise. La direction d'Alibaba est même consciente que sa plateforme n'est pas parfaite, mais elle tente aujourd'hui de rectifier le tir avec Marque+ : un endroit où les quelques 2 000 marques partenaires vendent directement leurs produits aux consommateurs. ...

item.title: Control: Ultimate Edition is out for the iPhone and iPad
item.description: Control is one of my favorite adventure games of the last decade or so, a mind-bending trip through an ever-changing building where you get to use telekinesis to battle some pretty freaky enemies. It was a graphically-demanding game when it was released in 2019, but a lot can change in less than six years: Control: Ultimate Edition is now available on the iPhone and iPad for a mere $5, following its announcement last October. It’s a universal purchase, which means if you buy it it’ll work on the iPad, iPhone and Mac as well. Developer Remedy promises that it’s the full Control experience, with...

item.title: USAID Whistleblower Says It Was Even Worse Than People Knew
item.description: Political appointees wanted a quiet drawdown, the whistleblower says. DOGE wanted an execution.

item.title: Cathie Woods’ ARK makes its first lead investment in startup Lucra — and it isn’t AI
item.description: Lucra offers corporate loyalty programs reimagined as interactive eSports. But winning ARK as a lead wasn't easy.

item.title: I used to edit print magazines — ChatGPT Images 2’s magazine layouts look real, but they’re completely unusable
item.description: ChatGPT Images 2 can generate magazine layouts that look impressively real, but without editability or workflow integration, they’re little more than surface-level illusions of something useful.

item.title: 'Defender covers everyday risk without requiring additional software': Microsoft says its antivirus is all many Windows 11 users need — but is that right?
item.description: Is Windows 11's built-in antivirus enough to keep you safe? Microsoft thinks that's the case.

item.title: Here’s to the stable ones: In praise of Tim Cook
item.description: Tim Cook’s tenure as Apple CEO ends September 1 when he takes the role of executive chair. He will be replaced by John Ternus, a 25-year Apple veteran and head of its hardware engineering division. I get the sense Cook’s professional obituaries will focus on his steady hand, execution success and lack of intra-company drama. All of those are virtues but I suspect the media, ever in love with a narrative of its own concoction, will use them as cudgels. Consider this an attempt to balance the record ahead of Cook’s damning with the faintest of praise. Cook is quiet and private, making it easy to...

item.title: Bouygues Telecom : l’inflation fait déjà gonfler les factures Bbox
item.description: Les abonnés Bouygues Telecom pensaient avoir un peu de répit face aux hausses de tarifs en cette nouvelle année. Pourtant, l'indexation automatique des abonnements Bbox sur l'inflation est déjà une réalité sur les factures de ce printemps, prenant de court de nombreux clients.

item.title: 'Hacktivist attacks at scale’: UK could face hacktivist threats akin to some of the biggest ransomware incidents but with 'no option to pay a ransom to help recover'
item.description: Hacktivists could attack the UK at a scale rivaling some of the costliest ransomware attacks in recent memory

item.title: Sony’s PlayStation 5 is $200 off for the first time since December
item.description: When the price increases for PlayStation 5 consoles went into effect on April 2nd, we weren’t sure when the next time a good discount would happen. Surely, not for at least a couple months, right? Well, now just a few weeks later, Sony’s direct-to-consumer site is offering the slim PS5 console with no disc drive […]

item.title: Building a great website now means simplifying your tech stack
item.description: Simplifying website tech stacks reduces complexity, improves performance, and enables scalable, efficient growth.

item.title: Ce n’est pas tous les jours qu’une Apple Watch Series 11 perd 35 % et c’est pourquoi cette offre est immanquable
item.description: Le dernier cru des montres Apple est en promotion chez Rakuten grâce à un code promo. L'Apple Watch Series 11 passe donc de 449 euros à 294,99 euros.

item.title: Now Meta will track what employees do on their computers to train its AI agents
item.description: Meta employees' activity at work is now being used to train the company's AI agents. As reported by Reuters, Meta is installing a tool it calls Model Capability Initiative (MCI) on US-based employees' computers that runs in work-related apps and websites, recording mouse movements, clicks, keystrokes, and occasional screenshots. The data from this tool will […]...

item.title: Le retour du casque airbag pour vélo est enfin annoncé
item.description: À la suite d'une faillite puis d'une reprise d'activité l’an dernier, l’unique casque airbag pour vélo Hövding débarque dans sa 4e génération cet automne, avec une conception totalement revue.

item.title: OpenAI teams up with Infosys to bring AI tools to more businesses
item.description: Infosys said the integration will be used to help its clients modernize software development, automate workflows, and deploy AI systems, initially focusing software engineering, legacy modernization, and DevOps.

item.title: C’est un moment critique : la sonde la plus lointaine de la Terre entre dans une zone à haut risque
item.description: Un nouvel appareil de la sonde Voyager 1 a été éteint, dans l'espoir de réaliser quelques petites économies d'énergie et de prolonger cette mission emblématique aux confins du Système solaire.

item.title: The Jackery Explorer 300 portable power station is back at a record-low price at Amazon — get ready for camping season
item.description: The Jackery Explorer 300 portable power station is on sale at Amazon for $188.99, down from the standard price of $279. That's a 32% discount.

item.title: UK government says 100 countries have spyware that can hack people’s phones
item.description: The U.K.'s cybersecurity chief warned that U.K. businesses and critical infrastructure are underestimating the threat from spyware attacks and other cyberthreats, with more governments having access to the powerful surveillance technology than ever.

item.title: Framework reveals its 'MacBook Pro for Linux users' — and fans say the new Laptop 13 Pro is 'genuinely stellar' aside from one drawback
item.description: Framework has unveiled its take on a MacBook Pro using Linux, and as far as laptop enthusiasts are concerned, it's pretty much nailed it.

item.title: 'Felony murder law does not require that a defendant pull the trigger': Ex-FBI chief calls for ransomware attackers to face homicide charges if attacks lead to deaths
item.description: The FBI needs to "step up" in the fight against ransomware, says Cynthia Kaiser, former deputy assistant director of the FBI's cyber division.

item.title: Trump announces the U.S. is extending its ceasefire with Iran, as new round of peace talks stalls
item.description: The extension, which came at Pakistan’s request, is indefinite. President Donald Trump said Tuesday the United States was indefinitely extending its ceasefire with Iran — a day before it was to expire — as a new round of peace talks was on hold. The announcement appeared to ease fears that the fighting, which had shaken energy markets and the global economy, would promptly resume.Pakistan had planned to host a second round of talks, but the White House put on hold Vice President JD Vance’s planned trip to Islamabad as Iran rebuffed efforts to restart negotiations.Iran has not yet responded to ...

item.title: I bought Alienware’s $350 OLED monitor and I can’t believe how good it is
item.description: I've recommended several OLED gaming monitors to readers over the years, and I've finally taken my own advice to buy one. Alienware's new 27-inch 1440p QD-OLED has all the features that I want and a low $350 price that was too tempting to ignore. The AW2726DM model has five things that make it stand out […]

item.title: Walt Disney World says its new solar facility can produce 100% of the daytime power for all its parks — and the scale is equivalent to 366 football fields
item.description: Walt Disney World's new solar facility is almost the size of Monaco, but it's just one of the sites that powers the entire resort.

item.title: Qui est John Ternus, le nouveau patron d’Apple ?
item.description: Le prochain PDG d’Apple, John Ternus, est un vétéran de l’entreprise qui a gravi les échelons de l’ingénierie de la division produits du fabricant d’iPhone, tout en jouant profil bas.

item.title: These are the games you should be playing if you loved The Super Mario Galaxy Movie — and yes, I've picked more than just the Mario Galaxy titles
item.description: These are the Mario games to play on Switch and Switch 2.

item.title: Batterie remplaçable obligatoire dès 2027 : vous avez sûrement mal compris la nouvelle loi
item.description: Une nouvelle réglementation européenne va obliger les constructeurs à proposer des batteries facilement remplaçables par les utilisateurs. Néanmoins, tous ne seront pas concernés. On détricote la situation.

item.title: Galaxy Buds Able : Samsung prépare des écouteurs à clip face à Bose et Huawei
item.description: Samsung s'apprête à faire son entrée sur le marché des écouteurs sans fil ouverts avec un modèle qui pourrait s’appeler les Galaxy Buds Able. Ils se clipseraient sur les oreilles et entendraient faire de la concurrence aux Bose, Sony, Huawei, SoundCore, et autres écouteurs du même genre.

item.title: Call of Duty never made much sense for Xbox Game Pass
item.description: Yesterday Microsoft announced some surprising news: at a time when everything in gaming is getting more expensive, Xbox Game Pass Ultimate was actually getting a price cut. Going forward, the subscription service will drop from $29.99 to $22.99 per month, less than a year after getting a major hike. But there's a caveat. Along with […]

item.title: Test du routeur 5G TP-Link M8550 : le routeur 5G de voyage avec option NAS
item.description: Conçu pour accompagner les utilisateurs nomades, mais pas que, le TP-Link M8550 a tous les atouts pour se positionner comme un routeur 5G complet et multi-usage. Découverte.

item.title: X makes it more expensive to post links through its API
item.description: Posting links on X through its API is now 1,900% more costly

item.title: 'Perfect' Dutton Ranch casting reveal carries on a longstanding Yellowstone tradition — but don't think this recurring role is going to be the same
item.description: Yellowstone spin-off Dutton Ranch has just dropped a huge casting announcement — but even though it looks like it, the new recurring role won't be the same as others.

item.title: As a new era approaches for Apple, we take a look back at the brand's big wins — here are the 6 best Apple gadgets ever, as voted by TechRadar readers
item.description: How many of your favorites were launched under the watchful eye of Tim Cook?

item.title: Plateforme Xpeng, 50 lancements et SUV électrique à 12 500 € : ce qu’il faut retenir de la conférence XXL de Volkswagen à Pékin
item.description: Mis en difficulté en Chine, Volkswagen profite du Salon de Pékin pour lancer une véritable offensive pensée par et pour le marché local. Nouveaux modèles, connectivité évoluée, partenariat avec Xpeng et aides à la conduite de pointe : les efforts sont là, reste à savoir s'ils paieront.

item.title: Xfinity Mobile now includes device protection and anytime phone upgrades
item.description: Cell phone plans can get exceedingly complicated, so Comcast’s pitch for Xfinity Mobile’s simplicity is rather appealing — particularly at a time when everything is more expensive than ever. Today, the company is announcing two simple plans priced at $30 and $45 a month that have some serious perks for their prices. The $30 Mobile Select plan covers the main basics, including 50GB of “premium” full-speed data; Global Travel Pass to cover yourself when traveling in 215 different countries; and Xfinity’s Wi-Fi PowerBoost. That latter feature takes advantage of Xfinity’s wide network of Wi-Fi hot...

item.title: Amazon remet le Google Fitbit Inspire 3 au goût du jour avec cette remise de 30 %
item.description: Les années passent, mais le Google Fitbit Inspire 3 résiste aux ravages du temps. Pour perdurer, le bracelet s'appuie sur un bel écran Amoled et une autonomie conséquente. En ce moment, l'accessoire est disponible pour 30 euros de moins sur Amazon.

item.title: "The future of space will look less like single-use expeditionary missions and more like a transport network": Pulsar Fusion's quest to build a nuclear fusion exhaust system for deep-space travel hits "first plasma" milestone
item.description: Following a "first plasma" milestone, Pulsar Fusion outlines its ambitious plans for a nuclear fusion exhaust system for deep-space travel.

item.title: Hey Meta workers, are you getting paid for those keystrokes?
item.description: No longer content to subsume recognizable intellectual properties, the majority of the indexed internet and books (basically all of them), AI will apparently now begin devouring its own workforce. A report in Reuters alleged that the keystrokes, mouse movements and clicks of Meta's workforce are to be captured for the purposes of training AI — something the company's communications department was happy to confirmed as accurate! In a cheery missive, a company spokesperson told Engadget that "If we're building agents to help people complete everyday tasks using computers, our models need real ex...
